name: Web Components Lego
summary: Modular catalog of UI/entity/resource components for miniApp generation. Declares the marker contract, per-recipe component lists, and golden-assembly fallbacks. The web-components layer is the largest single source of context cost on miniApp goals (~57% of assembled context pre-LF.1); this pack tracks what's emitted and what tools can fetch component source on demand.

recommendedMCPs.title: Install mchatai-web-components MCP
recommendedMCPs.summary: Lets the LLM tool-call into the catalog (list_components / read_component) instead of pre-loading 30-50KB of source per prompt. Required for LF.3 trim mode on Claude Code; large headroom win on every miniApp goal.
configRecipe: Add server entry to ~/.claude/mcp.json (Configure button writes this)
Restart Claude Code session so the MCP loads
Verify with: claude mcp call mchatai-web-components list_components
recommendedMCPs.notesIfMissing: Inline-source mode is used as fallback — works but eats ~30-50KB more context per miniApp prompt.
